title: acalypha integrifolia var. gracilipes
intro: Acalypha integrifolia var. gracilipes, also known as the slender copperleaf or slender acalypha, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acalypha integrifolia var. gracilipes include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
